description: The Quds Force (Jerusalem Force) is the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) branch responsible for extraterritorial operations, unconventional warfare, and support to non-state allies. It reports directly to the Supreme Leader. The Quds Force supports [Hezbollah](/orgs/hezbollah) in Lebanon, Hamas and Palestinian Islamic Jihad in Gaza, the Houthis in Yemen, and Shia militias in Iraq and Syria. It has been described by the US military as analogous to a combination of the CIA and JSOC.

sources.title: Treasury Designates the IRGC under Terrorism Authority and Targets IRGC and ESF in Response to Continued Sanctions Evasion

editorial_notes: Reports directly to Supreme Leader. Designated terrorist organisation by USA (2019), Canada (2012).
